message:
feat(engine): add docs accuracy gate, product blocker ledger, and shipped path parity verifier modules

Three new modules registered in lib.rs:

docs_accuracy_gate (RGC-911, bd-1lsy.10.11):
  Verifies that documented commands, flags, and behaviors match the
  actually shipped frankenctl surface. Enumerates the docs surface
  inventory, compares against the shipped binary contract, classifies
  drift by severity and user impact, and produces structured evidence
  reports. 1,020 lines.

engine_product_blocker_ledger (RGC-408B, bd-1lsy.5.10.2):
  Aggregates readiness signals from compatibility, parity, and module
  system work into a blocker ledger showing what prevents engine-level
  closure from becoming product-level closure in franken_node. Classifies
  gaps by surface and severity, rolls up per-cohort readiness, and
  carries evidence linkage with source beads and remediation owners.
  1,118 lines.

shipped_path_parity_verifier (RGC-806, bd-1lsy.9.6):
  Compares internal library entrypoints with frankenctl CLI command
  surfaces for the same workloads. Produces detailed divergence
  classification across command families (compile, run, verify,
  benchmark, replay) and input matrix (JS/TS). 1,542 lines source +
  470 lines integration tests.

All modules use BTreeMap/BTreeSet for deterministic ordering and
#![forbid(unsafe_code)].

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
